title: RMZ Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: RMZ Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!
